front: Novel: set in year 632 After Ford; soma drug ensures happiness; Bernard Marx at the London hatchery; John 'the Savage' has only read Shakespeare
Novel: John the Savage hangs himself at a lighthouse after Darwin Bonaparte photographs him; a media frenzy leads to an orgy
Novel: Philip Quarles is an author alter ego; Maurice Spandrell (based on Baudelaire) murders the fascist Everard Webley; Mark Rampion based on D.H. Lawrence
Novel: the shy poet Denis Stone fails to pursue Anne Wimbush at a country house party; Mr. Barbecue-Smith writes 1,500 words per hour
Work: describes mescaline experiments; titled from Blake's Marriage of Heaven and Hell; inspired Jim Morrison to name his band
work: The Doors of Perception and Other Works

front: Novel: the immortality-seeking millionaire Jo Stoyte; the ape-like Fifth Earl of Gonister is 200 years old
back: After Many a Summer Dies the Swan (Aldous Huxley)
